---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: '[feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
Example: "I want to fetch X but there's no method for it."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include example usage if possible:

```typescript
// How the new API would look
const result = await anilist.someNewMethod(...);
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered and why they don't fit.

## Additional Context

Links, references to AniList API docs, or anything else relevant.
